code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9
  if is_space
    in_word = false
  else
    if not in_word
      if not string.is_empty(result)
        result = "#{result} "
      end
      in_word = true
      let out_b = if b >= 97 and b <= 122
        b - 32
      else
        b
      end
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out_b)}"
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
